Class GUISelectionController

java.lang.Object
GUISelectionController
All Implemented Interfaces:
ActionListener, EventListener
public class GUISelectionController extends Object implements ActionListener
Class file for the GUISelectionController class

This class serves a similar purpose to the SelectionController but this time providing visuals for selection

      type - type of selection to be displayed
      index - index of the object in their respective array
